system.description:
@UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-species.Item.6OWmOJCIv6b2PeFC]{Belphemon}'s attacks have a 30% chance to inflict @Affliction[drowsy 3] in addition to any other effects they may have.

Whilst in Sleep Mode, @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-species.Item.6OWmOJCIv6b2PeFC]{Belphemon} gains @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.D8JyOIVe0QKg3Yr8]{Comatose} as a Slotless Ability and the move @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-moves.QFOJB00Ym1lwUVZK]{Gift of Darkness} is @Affliction[disabled].

Whilst in Rage Mode, @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-moves.QFOJB00Ym1lwUVZK]{Gift of Darkness} becomes a Connected Move. The @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.D8JyOIVe0QKg3Yr8]{Comatose}, @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.f2U5Z13avChRt8wK]{Sweet Dreams} & @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.3ZCH7gSdy6dr0L4N]{Lazy} Abilities become @Affliction[nullified], and in their place, Belphemon gains the @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.rSYO6GLFA2E5JQvu]{Anger Point}, @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.0slSWf8A2NVtWyqZ]{Rampage} and @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.H5Bj6BH9PXRl0ryU]{Furious Howl} abilities.
